title: Aureline motion-preset record
description: Boundary schema for the motion_preset_record frozen in docs/ux/theme_and_visual_asset_contract.md. Every named animation, transition, state change, progress indicator, focus-advance, or guided-overlay step that a component contract, theme package, or extension overlay points at resolves through one record of this shape. The record names the preset id, kind (transition / entrance / exit / state_change / progress_indicator / guided_overlay_step / focus_advance), the semantic-transition class it expresses, the named duration token refs, the named easing token refs, the per-accessibility-posture reduced-motion substitution policy (collapse_to_instant / crossfade_only / essential_keep_simplified / suppress_entirely / non_motion_state_marker), the no-hue-only substitution invariants, the equivalent semantic state markers that MUST remain visible when motion is suppressed, the safety-critical / state-machine compatibility class, the extension and theme override boundaries, and the typed evidence hooks that prove the preset preserves component-state semantics across postures. The schema mints no parallel accessibility_posture_class, semantic_status_class, trust_visual_state_class, motion duration token, motion easing token, or deployment_profile_id vocabulary; those values are re-exported by reference from schemas/design/token_export_manifest.schema.json, artifacts/governance/deployment_profiles.yaml, and schemas/governance/capability_lifecycle.schema.json. Adding a new motion_preset_kind_class, semantic_transition_class, reduced_motion_substitution_class, motion_duration_token, motion_easing_token, or denial_reason is additive-minor and bumps theme_asset_schema_version; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in manifests / support bundles.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp produced from a monotonic clock source.

motion_duration_token.description: Closed motion-duration token vocabulary re-exported from the design-system style guide §10.2 without modification. Adding a new duration token is additive-minor and bumps theme_asset_schema_version.

motion_easing_token.description: Closed motion-easing token vocabulary re-exported from the design-system style guide §10.3 without modification. Adding a new easing token is additive-minor and bumps theme_asset_schema_version.

motion_preset_kind_class.description: Closed motion-preset kind vocabulary. transition covers in-place property change; entrance / exit cover surface appearance and dismissal; state_change names a component-state transition (e.g. idle → degraded); progress_indicator covers tiny progress loops permitted in §10.4; guided_overlay_step names a tour / coachmark / overlay-step transition; focus_advance covers the focus-ring advance / suppress dance. See contract §8.

semantic_transition_class.description: Closed semantic-transition vocabulary. Component contracts cite this class so a downstream packet can inherit visual behaviour mechanically without redefining its own visual timing or fallback semantics. See contract §8.

reduced_motion_substitution_class.description: Closed reduced-motion substitution vocabulary. collapse_to_instant resolves to motion.instant under the listed posture; crossfade_only keeps a short opacity crossfade with no translation/scale; essential_keep_simplified keeps the motion in a simplified form when state conveyance would otherwise be lost; suppress_entirely removes the motion (the slot may still mark state through non-motion cues); non_motion_state_marker promotes the equivalent semantic-state marker into the slot when motion is suppressed (e.g. a chip, label, or icon). A reduced-motion fallback whose substitution class is null is non-conforming. See contract §8.

denial_reason.description: Closed denial-reason set publishers MUST emit on non-conformance. See contract §10.

non_motion_state_marker_class.description: Closed non-motion state-marker vocabulary. Every motion preset that conveys component state MUST list at least one non-motion marker so suppressed-motion postures still preserve state conveyance. Reduced opacity and hue alone are non-conforming.

fallback_duration_token.description: Optional duration token for the fallback. Required when substitution_class = essential_keep_simplified or crossfade_only; null for collapse_to_instant / suppress_entirely / non_motion_state_marker.

fallback_easing_token.description: Optional easing token for the fallback. Required when substitution_class = essential_keep_simplified or crossfade_only; null for collapse_to_instant / suppress_entirely / non_motion_state_marker.

non_motion_state_markers.description: Non-motion state markers that remain visible under this posture so the user still perceives the state change. A list with no markers is non-conforming for any preset that conveys component state.

preserves_state_conveyance.description: Frozen at true: every reduced-motion fallback MUST preserve state conveyance; a fallback that strips all state chrome and leaves only colour is non-conforming.

preserves_focus_visibility.description: Frozen at true: every reduced-motion fallback MUST preserve focus visibility; a fallback that hides the focus ring under reduced-motion or low-power posture is non-conforming.

reduced_motion_fallback_record.description: One reduced-motion fallback per accessibility posture this preset covers. The set MUST include motion_reduced and motion_critical_hot_path at minimum; first-party presets cover the full posture set.

from_state_ref.description: Opaque ref to the originating component-state class (e.g. 'idle', 'pending', 'restricted'). Re-exported by reference from schemas/design/token_export_manifest.schema.json component_state_class without modification.

to_state_ref.description: Opaque ref to the destination component-state class.

preserved_under_postures.description: Postures under which this state transition remains semantically observable to the user (through motion or its non-motion fallback). MUST include motion_reduced for any preset wired to a component state machine.

component_state_compatibility_record.description: One row per component-state transition this preset is wired to. Reviewers can inspect whether the preset's reduced-motion behaviour preserves the underlying state machine or collapses it.

preset_id.description: Opaque, stable preset id (e.g. 'motion-preset:guided_overlay.tour_advance', 'motion-preset:durable_job_row.state_change'). Frozen on first publication; rename = breaking.

preset_revision_ref.description: Opaque revision id for this preset emission.

default_duration_tokens.description: Named duration token refs the preset uses under motion_standard. Tokens outside the closed set are non-conforming (denial_reason = motion_preset_duration_outside_token_set).

default_easing_tokens.description: Named easing token refs the preset uses under motion_standard. Tokens outside the closed set are non-conforming.

reduced_motion_fallbacks.description: Per-posture reduced-motion fallbacks. MUST include motion_reduced and motion_critical_hot_path; first-party presets cover the full closed accessibility-posture set. A preset emitted without a motion_reduced fallback is non-conforming (denial_reason = motion_preset_no_reduced_motion_fallback).

component_state_compatibility.description: Component-state transitions this preset is wired to. MAY be empty for purely cosmetic transitions (e.g. focus_ring_advance) but MUST be non-empty for state_change presets.

non_motion_state_markers.description: Non-motion state markers required at the slot level whenever the motion is suppressed. Hue alone is non-conforming.

no_hue_only_substitution.description: Frozen at true: a reduced-motion fallback MUST NOT substitute the suppressed motion with a hue-only change (e.g. swapping a translation animation for a colour shift). The substituted state always carries shape, border, icon, or text.

preserves_focus_visibility.description: Frozen at true: every motion preset MUST preserve focus visibility across every posture. Hiding focus rings during a transition is non-conforming.

preserves_state_conveyance.description: Frozen at true: every motion preset MUST preserve state conveyance across every posture. A fallback that collapses the state machine into one generic 'something happened' posture is non-conforming.

is_safety_critical.description: Whether this preset backs a safety-critical surface (trust prompts, recovery banners, policy-locked or restricted-workspace state changes). Safety-critical presets MUST be host_owned_no_override at the extension boundary.

extension_override_boundary_class.description: Closed extension-override boundary vocabulary; identical shape to icon_slot_map.schema.json so component contracts can reuse the same vocabulary across icon and motion hooks.

theme_override_boundary_class.description: Closed theme-override boundary vocabulary. theme_may_recolor_only forbids any motion change (the theme may only retint accompanying colour tokens); theme_may_replace_motion_with_disclosure permits replacement only with a declared compatibility note; theme_locked_to_first_party_motion forbids any theme motion swap (typical for safety-critical and tour-step presets).

progress_loop_permitted.description: Whether this preset is allowed to use a continuous loop. Frozen false for every preset_kind_class except progress_indicator; a loop emitted from any other kind is non-conforming (denial_reason = motion_preset_progress_loop_outside_permitted_kinds).

allOf.description: state_change presets MUST cite at least one component-state-compatibility row.
progress_indicator is the only preset kind permitted to set progress_loop_permitted = true.
Safety-critical presets MUST NOT be replaceable by extensions.
